name: archerslab
description: Installing: 1. Clone the repo or install the zip file and unzip it 2. Run `npm install` inside `client` and `server` folders 3. Run `npm install` inside the project's parent folder 4. Create your own `.env` file inside the `server` folder    - look at `/server/.env.example` for instructions

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm start --prefix server"
